main.description: Exchange a member grant token for a space credential. Called on the space owner's PDS. The space credential can be used to read data from member PDSes.

grant.description: A signed JWT member grant token.

serviceEndpoint.description: The service endpoint of the requesting application, used for write notifications.

errors.name: NotAMember
errors.description: The grant issuer is not a member of this space.

errors.name: InvalidGrant
errors.description: The member grant token is invalid, expired, or not verifiable.
